messages.content: # Cutting up and you want to indicate your next direction? Follow this guide!

## Method 1
> Open Content Manager and go to Settings > Assetto Corsa > Controls > Patch > Car

## Method 2
> There is a way to have the blinkers automatically turn on and off. 
> Follow https://discord.com/channels/964645662866173972/1322248427853058118
